title: Urban Tree Challenge Fund claims and guidance for existing grant holders
body: "The UTCF is closed. The fund was open from 2019 to 2024. Use these claim forms and guidance to help you manage your existing UTCF agreement.  Contact us  Get help by emailing UTCF@forestrycommission.gov.uk or phone the Operational Delivery team on 0300 067 4177.  Find information about:   other grants from the Forestry Commission other grants for farmers and land managers making a complaint or appeal   "
